---
name: 🌍 Glossary Contribution

labels: glossary, good first issue

## Language
- Language name:
- ISO 639-1 code:

## Domain
- [ ] `general_academic` — Paper sections, research methods
- [ ] `cs` — Computer Science
- [ ] `ml` — Machine Learning
- [ ] Other (specify):

## Number of Terms
Approximately how many terms are you contributing?

## Sample Terms
Provide 3-5 sample term mappings:

| English | Translation |
|---|---|
| abstract | |
| methodology | |
| hypothesis | |

## Notes
Any additional context about translation choices.
